locator.quote: Two argmax-eval rollouts of the same trained policy on the same eval day produce

text: Reproducibility gate: two argmax-eval rollouts of the same trained policy on the same eval day produce bit-identical pnl.
Rank-correlation gate: argmax need not be the same signal as multi-day-mean, just a strongly correlated cheaper proxy (Spearman >= 0.7).

locator.quote: reveals real structure that argmax hides

text: Failure mode: if rank correlation is poor, the noise agents make under sampling reveals real structure that argmax hides - do not ship as default.
